loginPage.title: Welcome back
loginPage.subtitle: Sign in to your account to continue

registerPage.title: Create your account
registerPage.subtitle: Get started with AgentsMesh today
registerPage.usernameHint: 3-50 characters, letters, numbers, and underscores only
registerPage.termsText: By creating an account, you agree to our
registerPage.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters

forgotPasswordPage.title: Reset your password
forgotPasswordPage.subtitle: Enter your email address and we'll send you a link to reset your password.
forgotPasswordPage.emailSentDescription: If an account exists for {email}, you will receive a password reset link shortly.
forgotPasswordPage.sendFailed: Failed to send reset email. Please try again.

verifyEmailPage.title: Verify your email
verifyEmailPage.subtitle: We've sent a verification email to {email}.
verifyEmailPage.subtitleDefault: We've sent a verification email to your email address.
verifyEmailPage.clickLink: Please click the link in the email to verify your account.
verifyEmailPage.signUpDifferent: Sign up with a different email
verifyEmailPage.emailSent: Verification email sent! Please check your inbox.
verifyEmailPage.resendFailed: Failed to resend verification email. Please try again.
verifyEmailPage.pleaseWait: Please wait while we verify your email address.
verifyEmailPage.verificationFailed: Failed to verify email. Please try again or request a new verification link.
verifyEmailPage.invalidToken: This verification link is invalid or has expired. Please request a new one.
verifyEmailPage.alreadyVerifiedError: This email has already been verified. Please sign in.

sso.orUsePassword: またはパスワードを使用
sso.completingSignIn: ログインを完了しています...
sso.pleaseWait: アカウントの設定中です。しばらくお待ちください。
sso.signInSuccess: ログインに成功しました。
sso.signInFailed: ログインに失敗しました
sso.callbackAccessDenied: 認証リクエストがキャンセルされました。
sso.callbackMissingToken: 認証トークンがありません。
sso.callbackGenericError: 認証を完了できませんでした。
sso.ssoRequired: このドメインではパスワードログインが無効です。SSOでサインインしてください。

onboarding.setupWorkspace: Let's set up your workspace to get started.
onboarding.quickStartDescription: Create a personal workspace and start using AgentsMesh immediately.
onboarding.createTeamWorkspaceDescription: Set up a workspace for your team with a custom name and invite members.
onboarding.inviteCodeComingSoon: Invite code feature is coming soon
onboarding.createWorkspaceFailed: Failed to create workspace. The name might already be taken.

createOrg.title: Create Team Workspace
createOrg.subtitle: Set up a workspace for your team to collaborate.
createOrg.workspaceNameHint: This is the display name for your workspace.
createOrg.urlIdentifierHint: This will be used in URLs. Only lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens are allowed.
createOrg.urlTooShort: URL identifier must be at least 3 characters
createOrg.urlTaken: This URL identifier is already taken. Please try another.
createOrg.createFailed: Failed to create workspace. Please try again.
